cc-version-check nudge simulator

Bump latest_known 2.1.191 → 2.1.193. The hook warns below the floor, nudges above LATEST_KNOWN_CC, stays silent in range. Drag the running version and flip the bump to see why the nudge was firing every session on 2.1.193.

2.1.193
floor (frozen): 2.1.183 latest_known: 2.1.191
  • 🔵 latest_known 2.1.191 → 2.1.193 — 2.1.192 was never published (npm jumps 191→193)
  • 🔐 doctor compat table documents OTEL_LOG_ASSISTANT_RESPONSES — the new claude_code.assistant_response OTEL event logs response text on upgrade (secret-leak class)
  • 🧹 untracked the stray src/hooks/node_modules symlink (self-referential, slipped in via #2645)
The floor stays frozen at 2.1.183 (override expires 2026-09-20); only latest_known advances — by design it diverges from latest while the floor is frozen. 2.1.184–2.1.193 were all verified no-op for ork, so advancing latest_known clears the per-session adoption-lag nudge without touching the support floor.
